Case# vmnet_return_t.VMNET_MEM_FAILURE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
case VMNET_MEM_FAILURE
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_return_t/vmnet_mem_failure#Discussion)

Indicates failure caused by running out of memory.
